channel.title: FastAPI on Shehao Li
channel.description: Recent content in FastAPI on Shehao Li

item.title: CalendarDIFF | AI Agent Workflow System for Gmail + ICS
item.description: AI schedule-change governance backend for Gmail + ICS multi-source intake, built around rules filtering, structured LLM extraction, proposal generation, human approval, explicit runtime control, and annual chronological replay.

item.title: Author Copilot Narrative Editing and Evaluation Platform
item.description: Live interactive narrative product built around an Author Copilot editing loop, a stateful Play runtime, and end-to-end author -> publish -> play evaluation.
